questions.question: Where should the canonical debug-hooks source markdown live?

options.label: Move to patterns/debug-hooks/SKILL.md (Recommended)
options.description: Follow existing convention (distributed-lock, database-service all live under patterns/<id>/SKILL.md). Delete the project-local .claude/skills/debug-hooks/ copy. `regin rebuild` + `skills push` will deploy it globally.

options.label: Keep both copies in sync
options.description: Leave .claude/skills/debug-hooks/SKILL.md as the working draft AND copy it to patterns/debug-hooks/SKILL.md for registration. Risk: two files drift out of sync.

options.label: Register in place from .claude/skills/
options.description: Modify skill_deployer to accept .claude/skills/ as a source root. Biggest change, deviates from existing convention.

questions.question: How should tagging be handled for debug-hooks?

options.label: Add new tags to config/tags.yaml (Recommended)
options.description: Add `hooks` (tech), `tracing` (concept), `debugging` (concept) to config/tags.yaml. Rebuild will auto-seed them into the tags table. These tags will be reusable for future observability patterns.

options.label: Reuse only existing tags
options.description: Closest existing matches: `grit` (tech), maybe `error-handling` (concept). Neither is a great fit — the pattern would be under-discoverable.

options.label: Skip tagging for now
options.description: Register the pattern without tags. It will still appear by slug in search but won't show up in tag-based browsing.
